about.heroTagline: Digital Altar — Prayer for All Nations
about.heroQuote: United in the Holy Spirit, shaking the Heavens.
about.introText: HOLYPray is a global digital prayer altar, where everyone can pause, pray, intercede together, track impact, and enter an ecosystem built on holiness, love, transparency and faithful stewardship.
about.heroSub: Connecting millions of hearts, one prayer for a peaceful world. UNPray is a global non-profit platform combining spiritual depth with real social impact.
about.missionText: Building a global prayer community where every prayer not only uplifts the spirit but also creates real humanitarian impact — from education, healthcare to food and clean water.
about.value.faithDesc: Everything we do stems from a deep faith in the power of prayer.
about.value.transparencyDesc: Every donated dollar is tracked and publicly reported. Nothing is hidden.
about.value.unityDesc: We believe that when people unite in prayer, miracles happen.
about.value.globalDesc: No borders, no discrimination. Every prayer is equally valued.
about.joinText: Every prayer, every donation creates change. Become part of this global movement.

hl.toVal: Beloved Servants of God and Christian Families Around the World
hl.fromVal: Abraham Nguyen Quang Huy (Dubai, UAE) – 9S UNION
hl.greeting: Dear beloved brothers and sisters in Christ, 🤍🔥
hl.p1: I write these lines from Dubai — where last night, the sky was torn apart by streaks of rocket fire, and the sound of air-raid sirens replaced the peace. In that moment, God's Word thundered within my spirit: "Nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom" (Matthew 24:7).
hl.p2: The conflict that erupted on February 28, 2026, between Iran, Israel, and the United States is not merely a geopolitical crisis. For the Church of God, it is a spiritual alarm bell — the "birth pains" (Matthew 24:8) — reminding us that the last days are unfolding before our very eyes.
hl.p3: But, brothers and sisters, Jesus said: "See that you are not alarmed" (Matthew 24:6).
hl.bold1: Panic belongs to the world. But VIGILANCE, UNITY, AND INTERCESSION belong to the children of God. 🙏
hl.s1Title: 1) PRAY FOR ISRAEL & THE MIDDLE EAST 🕊
hl.s1: Lord, have mercy and protect Your people. Reign over the Middle East — the cradle of faith — now writhing in smoke and fire. Extinguish violence, halt destruction, break every dark scheme, and deliver the innocent. May Your peace — shalom — cover every trembling land.
hl.s2: Scripture teaches us to intercede for those in authority so that society may live in peace (1 Timothy 2:1–2). At this hour, we stand not in debate, but in intercession.
hl.s2i1: Especially for President Donald Trump and the U.S. Government: Lord, grant supernatural wisdom, humility, and a spirit of justice.
hl.s2i2: For Israel's leaders: Lord, grant vigilance and the fear of God.
hl.s2i3: For leaders of Muslim nations, especially Iran: Lord, touch their hearts and replace hatred with a longing for peace.
hl.s3: Lord, break the apathy, selfishness, and hatred that engulf humanity. Let Agape Love flow like a healing river — healing families, communities, peoples, and nations.
hl.verse: "If my people, who are called by my name, will humble themselves and pray and seek my face and turn from their wicked ways, then I will hear from heaven, and I will forgive their sin and will heal their land."
hl.c1: Dear brothers and sisters, now is not the time to sleep.
hl.c2: Turn your home into an altar — a place of worship unto God.
hl.c3: Turn your church into a fortress of intercession.
hl.c4: Let the sound of praise drown out the sound of bombs. Shake the world with worship, not missiles and artillery. 🔥
hl.c5: May God the Father have mercy on this world.
hl.c6: May the Lord Jesus Christ keep us in perfect peace.
hl.c7: May the Holy Spirit guide us in every prayer.
hl.sign1: Wholeheartedly for the Kingdom of God,
hl.sign3:
Abraham Nguyen Quang Huy – Co-Chairman, 9S UNION
(A call from the eye of the storm, Dubai – UAE, March 1, 2026)
